code: import api from'./client';export async function fetchDonors(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const{data}=await api.get('/donors',{params});return Array.isArray(data)?data:[];}export async function requestDonorBooking(donorId,userId){const{data}=await api.post("/donors/".concat(donorId,"/request"),null,{params:{userId}});return data;}export async function cancelDonorBooking(donorId,userId){const{data}=await api.post("/donors/".concat(donorId,"/cancel"),null,{params:{userId}});return data;}
